sprint.title: Voice UX v1: react-voice-visualizer Waveform + Studio Textbox Record & Append
sprint.goal: Use react-voice-visualizer to show a live waveform while recording and hide it when recording stops. Add in-Studio voice recording for textboxes so new transcriptions are appended/concatenated to existing text (same pipeline as Q&A). Ship a polished, elder-friendly UI around recording states.
definitionOfDone: Waveform component appears only while recording and hides when recording stops
Recording UI clearly shows states: Idle → Listening → Processing → Inserted/Error
Wizard Q&A uses waveform while recording and continues to send audio to ElevenLabs as before
Studio textbox: when user clicks a textbox, they can start recording; transcribed text is appended to existing content
Append behavior is deterministic (adds a space/newline as configured)
Cancel does not modify text; Retry works after failures
Microphone stream is released properly on stop/unmount (no stuck mic indicator)
No regressions to existing STT flow, editor selection, or save/resume

stackAssumptions.editor: Studio canvas editor supports entering text edit mode and committing content

backlog.title: Adopt react-voice-visualizer as the waveform layer (wrapper component + consistent states)

libraryUsage: Use useVoiceVisualizer hook to control recording and get state
Render VoiceVisualizer component only when recording is active
constraints: Waveform must not be visible in idle state
Waveform must stop immediately on stopRecording (no lag)
No heavy rerenders: waveform component isolated

acceptanceTests: Waveform shows only during listening state
Stop hides waveform and releases mic

backlog.title: Unify microphone capture pipeline: waveform + ElevenLabs upload from same recording session

behavior: On stop, get recorded audio blob (from the library) and send to ElevenLabs (existing endpoint/action)
Show processing state while STT is running
constraints: Do not change STT provider logic; only refactor how audio blob is produced
Ensure blob format is compatible with your ElevenLabs ingestion

acceptanceTests: Audio recorded via visualizer reaches ElevenLabs and returns transcript
Processing state shows until transcript is returned

backlog.title: Wizard Q&A recording UI refresh: show waveform + status pill + controls
acceptanceTests: Waveform visible only while recording
Cancel discards and does not change text
Undo reverts inserted transcript

backlog.title: Studio textbox voice: add 'Record' option on textbox focus and append transcript to existing text

entryPoints: When a textbox is selected/focused in Studio: show a small mic button in the floating toolbar
Also allow a context menu action: 'Record & append'
appendRules: Default: append with a space if last char is not whitespace
If textbox supports paragraphs: append with '\n\n' (configurable)
Transcribed text is concatenated to existing content (no replacement unless user chooses)
constraints: Must work with your current text node model (plain or Tiptap JSON if already migrated)
If rich text: append as a new paragraph node
If page/textbox is locked: disable record action

acceptanceTests: Recording in Studio appends transcript to the selected textbox
Recording action is disabled on locked page/textbox
Cancel does not modify textbox content

backlog.title: Beautiful Studio recording UI: overlay anchored to textbox (waveform + controls)

ui: Small overlay card anchored near the active textbox
constraints: Must not block canvas interactions outside overlay
Overlay should reposition if textbox moves

acceptanceTests: Overlay appears near textbox and does not cover selection handles
Overlay closes automatically on completion or cancel

backlog.title: Handle microphone lifecycle cleanly (stop releases stream, unmount cleanup)

cleanup: Stop recording closes tracks and releases mic indicator
Component unmount stops recording if active
Prevent multiple simultaneous recorders (wizard vs studio) using a shared 'voice session lock'
constraints: No zombie audio contexts or ongoing streams

acceptanceTests: Mic is released after stop/cancel and on route change
Attempting to start recording in two places shows a friendly message

backlog.title: Error handling + retries (ElevenLabs failures, permission denied, empty audio)

ui: Keep existing text unchanged on error
Optional help link: 'How to enable microphone'
constraints: Errors must include stable error codes for Sentry

acceptanceTests: Failure does not corrupt editor state
Retry works after error

backlog.title: Telemetry hooks (Sentry breadcrumbs/spans) for voice start/stop/transcribe
acceptanceTests: Voice errors appear in Sentry with context and codes
No sensitive content logged

backlog.title: QA + automated tests for waveform visibility and studio append behavior

manualChecklist: Wizard: start recording -> waveform visible; stop -> processing; transcript inserted
Wizard: cancel -> no changes; waveform hidden
Studio: select textbox -> record overlay -> transcript appended with spacing
Permission denied -> error shown; retry works after granting permission
automation: UI test: waveform component renders only in listening state
Integration: transcribeWithElevenLabs called on stop and result appended

acceptanceTests: At least 4 automated tests added and passing
No regression to existing STT flow

notes: react-voice-visualizer provides a hook (useVoiceVisualizer) and a component (VoiceVisualizer) to record and display real-time audio visualization. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}
Keep one active recording session at a time (wizard or studio) to avoid mic conflicts and user confusion.
